title: Green Habitats Garden Solar Tulip Lights, Multicolour, 6 Pack
features: DECORATIVE SOLAR LIGHTING: Set of 6 colourful tulip-shaped solar lights in vibrant purple, red, green, pink, blue, and yellow to add charm and elegance to your garden, pathway, or flower beds

SOLAR POWERED OPERATION: Each light features an integrated solar panel that charges during the day and automatically illuminates at dusk, providing eco-conscious outdoor lighting with no wiring or electricity costs required

WEATHER RESISTANT DESIGN: Durable construction suitable for year-round outdoor use, withstanding various weather conditions whilst maintaining their decorative appeal in gardens, lawns, and landscaped areas

EASY INSTALLATION: Simply stake the lights into soft ground wherever desired with no tools required, allowing you to create beautiful illuminated displays along pathways, around flower beds, or throughout your garden in seconds

REALISTIC TULIP APPEARANCE: Each light features authentic tulip flower design with green leaves, creating a natural look during the day whilst providing a soft, colourful glow at night to enhance your outdoor space
description: These charming solar tulip lights from Green Habitats bring a delightful splash of colour to your garden throughout the evening. This set of six decorative lights features vibrant multicoloured tulip blooms that capture sunlight during the day and automatically illuminate at dusk, creating an enchanting display along pathways, flower beds, or borders. The realistic tulip design adds a whimsical touch to your outdoor space, whilst the solar-powered technology means no wiring or electricity costs are required. Simply stake them into the ground wherever you'd like a pop of colour and let the sun do the rest. These lights are perfect for adding ambient lighting to your garden, creating a welcoming atmosphere for outdoor gatherings, or simply enjoying the beauty of illuminated flowers after sunset. The durable construction is designed to withstand various weather conditions, making them suitable for year-round garden decoration. Transform your outdoor space into a magical evening retreat with these delightful solar-powered tulip lights.
